name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N)+1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[%(i, N)+1] = -1 \/ forks[%(i, N)+1] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotDone
N == 3
channels == <<1,2>, <2,3>, <3,1>>  \* List of channels (source, destination)

(* Helper definitions *)
IsChannel(c) == c \in channels
IsProcess(p) == p \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> 1..N]  \* Each process starts with a unique state
       /\ channel \in [channels -> Seq(1..N)]  \* Each channel holds a sequence of messages
       /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]  \* Snapshot status of each process
       /\ markerSent \in [channels -> BOOLEAN]
       /\ markerReceived \in [channels -> BOOLEAN]
       /\ snapshotDone \in BOOLEAN
       /\ \A p \in 1..N : snapshot[p] = FALSE
       /\ \A c \in channels : markerSent[c] = FALSE
       /\ \A c \in channels : markerReceived[c] = FALSE
       /\ snapshotDone = FALSE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ snapshot[p] = FALSE
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
    /\ snapshotDone' = snapshotDone
  \/ \E c \in channels :
    /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
    /\ snapshotDone' = snapshotDone
  \/ \E c \in channels :
    /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    /\ snapshotDone' = snapshotDone
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ snapshot[p] = TRUE
    /\ \A c \in channels : c[2] = p
    /\ \A c \in channels : markerSent[c] = TRUE
    /\ \A c \in channels : markerReceived[c] = TRUE
    /\ snapshotDone' = TRUE
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotDone>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ channel \in [channels -> Seq(1..N)]
          /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerSent \in [channels -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerReceived \in [channels -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ snapshotDone \in BOOLEAN

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY, FiniteSet
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, <<>>)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = <<>>
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>> ==
